additional_notes: Oklahoma's 2026 Pro Day is scheduled for March 12, 2026 (today), but as of this search, no results have been published yet. The event is either currently underway or has just concluded. The SoonerSports.com official results page has not been updated, and no news outlets (247Sports, PFF, NFL.com, ESPN, etc.) have published testing numbers from today's pro day. Oklahoma had 10 players at the 2026 NFL Combine: EDGE R Mason Thomas (4.67 40, 1.63 10-yd split at combine; did not do jumps/agility), WR Deion Burks (4.30 40, 42.5-inch vertical at combine), DT Gracen Halton (4.82 40, 36.5-inch vertical at combine), DT Damonic Williams, EDGE Marvin Jones Jr. (4.69 40 at combine), LB Kendal Daniels, LB Owen Heinecke, S Robert Spears-Jennings (4.32 40 at combine), TE Jaren Kanak (4.52 40 at combine), and IOL Febechi Nwaiwu. Additional non-combine invitees such as RB Jaydn Ott are expected to participate. R Mason Thomas is a key prospect to watch — scouts want to see improved explosive testing after a disappointing combine. This record should be updated once results are published, likely later today or tomorrow morning from sources such as SoonerSports.com, 247Sports (Sooners Illustrated), Rivals (OUInsider), or NFL.com.
